com.agents-nexus.agent-memory.flush: Flushes buffered tmux + agent events to the agent-memory DB
com.agents-nexus.docker: Starts the agents-nexus Docker stack at login (proxy, langfuse, mnemon, dashboard)
com.agents-nexus.gl-reviews: Writes the GitLab review queue into today's Obsidian daily note
com.agents-nexus.gl-reviews-prune: Prunes stale reviewer assignments from open GitLab MRs
com.agents-nexus.langfuse-cost-snapshot: Daily: snapshots Langfuse cost/usage into Postgres so spend history survives the 10-day trace TTL
com.agents-nexus.muninn.sync: Syncs reMarkable rM1 handwritten pages into the Obsidian vault
com.agents-nexus.obs-decay: Weekly review: surfaces stale Obsidian notes for the user to action
com.agents-nexus.obs-digest: Digests the previous business day's Obsidian notes and posts to Slack
com.agents-nexus.obs-tag: Auto-tags newly-modified Obsidian notes via Claude
com.agents-nexus.obs-tidy: Tidies the Obsidian vault (broken links, orphans) and posts a Slack summary
com.agents-nexus.permission-suggest: Weekly: proposes safe Claude Code permission-allowlist additions from recent transcripts and pings Slack (propose-only)
com.agents-nexus.slack-bridge: Slack Socket Mode bridge — routes #nexus messages and thread replies to the right agent, and posts agent input-requests back to Slack
com.agents-nexus.example-service-mr-labe: Auto-applies severity labels, assignees, and reviewers to open example-service MRs
com.agents-nexus.example-service-rebase: Auto-rebases the example-service typed-tool-results branch onto origin/main
